creator: leifn@neland.dk
text:
piewm doesn't build

How-To-Repeat: rm -f util.o
cc -c -O     -I/usr/X11R6/include       -DMITMISC -DXTEST -DXSYNC -DXCMISC -DXRECORD     -DBIGREQS   -DDBE    -DBITMAPDIR=\"/usr/X11R6/include/X11/bitmaps\" -DSHAPE   -DNOPUTENV util.c
util.c:723: macro `index' used without args
*** Error code 1
